meta.title: Get Started - Quantum Shield
meta.description: Set up your Quantum Shield protection

step1.title: Connect Wallet
step1.description: Connect your wallet. We support MetaMask and other EVM-compatible wallets.

step2.title: Generate Dilithium Keys
step2.description: Generate quantum-resistant Dilithium key pairs. These keys are stored only on your device and never sent to servers.
step2.dilithiumTooltip: Dilithium is a quantum-resistant digital signature algorithm officially adopted by NIST in 2024. It uses lattice-based cryptography that is difficult to break even with quantum computers.

selfCustodyNotice.title: Only You Hold the Keys
selfCustodyNotice.description: Your private keys are stored only on your device. They are never sent to Quantum Shield servers, so no one else can access them. Be sure to create a backup and store it safely.

keyGeneration.idle: Click the button to start generation

step3.title: Backup Your Keys
step3.description: Back up your private keys in a safe location.

warning.title: Important: Keep your private keys safe
warning.description: Losing your private keys may result in difficulty accessing your assets. Always create a backup.

checklist.downloaded: I have downloaded the backup file
checklist.saved: I have saved the file to a secure location (USB drive, external HDD, printed on paper for offline storage). I avoid cloud storage and understand that losing this file may make my assets inaccessible.

step4.title: Ready to Go!
step4.description: Quantum Shield setup is complete. You can now use quantum-resistant protection.

walletHelp.title: How to Get a Wallet
walletHelp.intro: If you don't have a crypto wallet, follow these steps to get one.

metamaskSteps.step2: Click "Download" to install the browser extension
metamaskSteps.step3: Follow the prompts to create your wallet

warnings.warning1: Never share your seed phrase with anyone
warnings.warning2: Store it in a secure offline location
warnings.warning3: Only download from the official website

dilithium.title: What is Dilithium?
dilithium.intro: Dilithium is a digital signature algorithm that is secure against quantum computers.

whyReasons.reason1: Current cryptography (like ECDSA) may be broken by future quantum computers
whyReasons.reason2: To protect against 'harvest now, decrypt later' attacks, we need to act now

features.nist: NIST Certified: Officially standardized as FIPS 204 in 2024
features.lattice: Lattice-based: Mathematically resistant to quantum computers
features.fast: High Performance: Efficient signing and verification
features.level: Dilithium-III: Security level used by Quantum Shield

dilithium.securityDescription: Dilithium-III meets NIST Security Level 3, providing 128+ bits of both classical and quantum security.

tutorial.title: How to Use Tutorial
tutorial.intro: Here's a basic guide to using Quantum Shield.

lockSteps.step2: Enter the amount you want to protect

unlockSteps.emergency: Emergency Unlock: Wallet signature + Bond + 7-day wait

securityTips.tip1: Always back up your private keys

meta.title: Quantum Shield - Protect Your Assets with Quantum-Resistant Cryptography
meta.description: The world's first quantum-resistant cryptographic bridge combining Dilithium-III and ZK-STARKs. Protect your assets today from tomorrow's threats.

hero.subtitle: Protect your ETH and tokens from future quantum computer attacks. Secure your assets with NIST-certified next-generation cryptography. Get started in 3 simple steps.

dilithium.title: Dilithium-III Cryptography
dilithium.description: NIST-certified lattice-based digital signatures. Next-generation cryptography that is mathematically resistant to quantum computers.
dilithium.tooltip: Dilithium is a digital signature algorithm that is secure against quantum computers. It was standardized by NIST in 2024.

timeLock.title: Time Lock Protection
timeLock.description: 24-hour security waiting period. A temporal buffer to detect and prevent unauthorized access.
timeLock.tooltip: Time Lock provides a 24-hour waiting period before asset withdrawal. This allows time to detect and prevent fraud.

zkStark.title: ZK-STARK Verification
zkStark.description: Transparency and verifiability through zero-knowledge proofs. Achieves scalability while maintaining quantum resistance.
zkStark.tooltip: ZK-STARKs allow proving validity without revealing information. They are also resistant to quantum computers.

selfCustody.title: Self-Custody
selfCustody.description: You alone control your assets. Private keys are generated and stored locally, never sent to servers.
selfCustody.tooltip: Self-custody means managing your own assets without relying on third parties.

emergency.title: Emergency Recovery
emergency.description: Peace of mind even if you lose your private key. A safety net to recover assets with a 7-day wait and bond.
emergency.tooltip: Emergency recovery allows you to recover assets by depositing collateral, even if you lose your private key.

transparency.title: Transparency
transparency.description: All transactions are verifiable on-chain. Open-source, audited smart contracts.

step1.title: Generate Keys
step1.description: Connect your wallet and generate a Dilithium key pair. The private key is stored only on your device.

step2.title: Lock Assets
step2.description: Lock ETH or ERC-20 tokens in the quantum-resistant vault. Cannot be withdrawn without Dilithium signature.

step3.title: Unlock Safely
step3.description: Request unlock with Dilithium signature. After 24-hour Time Lock, assets safely return to your wallet.

cta.title: Prepare for the Quantum Era
cta.description: Protect your assets from 'harvest now, decrypt later' attacks. Start preparing today for tomorrow's threats.

brand.description: Digital asset protection for the quantum computing era. Safeguarding your assets from future threats with NIST-certified cryptography.
